vangelico_robbery.label: Vangelico Jewelry Heist
vangelico_robbery.description: Rob the Vangelico jewelry store and make a fortune.
vangelico_robbery.information: To successfully rob Vangelico, you need to disable the alarm system and crack the safes. Make sure to work together with your team to complete the heist.
vangelico_robbery.police_alert: Robbery in progress at Vangelico Jewelry Store!
vangelico_robbery.out_of_drone_range: You are out of the drone operation range, move closer to the store.
vangelico_robbery.go_to_drone_arena: Go to the marked area on the map and use the drone to drop gas bombs.
vangelico_robbery.all_gas_dropped: All gas grenades have been dropped.
vangelico_robbery.front_doors_locked: The front doors are locked. You need to plant a bomb at the front doors to enter.
vangelico_robbery.need_gas_mask: You need a gas mask to enter the store.
vangelico_robbery.plant_bomb: Plant the bomb at the door.
vangelico_robbery.front_door_breached: The front door has been breached!
vangelico_robbery.could_not_rob: Could not rob ped, maybe they are empty?
vangelico_robbery.could_not_loot: Could not loot display, maybe it's empty?
vangelico_robbery.need_smash_weapon: You need a suitable weapon to smash the case.
vangelico_robbery.required_weapon: You need a %s to take the painting.
vangelico_robbery.case_room_door_unlocked: Case room door has been unlocked!

vangelico_robbery.drill_already_on_surface: The drill is already on the surface.
vangelico_robbery.case_room_safe_opened: The safe in the case room has been opened.

house_robbery.label: House Robbery
house_robbery.description: Rob a house and make some quick cash.
house_robbery.information: To successfully rob a house, you need to find valuable items and avoid getting caught. Work with your team to complete the heist efficiently.
house_robbery.police_alert: Burglary in progress at a residential property!

house_robbery.no_lockpick: You do not have a lockpick to use.

house_robbery.no_reward_items_found: No reward items found for the given key: %s

atm_robbery.label: ATM Robbery
atm_robbery.description: Rob an ATM and make some quick cash.
atm_robbery.information: To successfully rob an ATM, you need to choose your method of interaction and work quickly to avoid getting caught. Make sure to collect the scattered loot after the robbery.
atm_robbery.hacking_successful: You have successfully robbed the ATM.
atm_robbery.already_hacked: This ATM has already been hacked.
atm_robbery.atm_not_robbed_yet: This ATM has not been robbed yet.

atm_robbery.atm_not_available: This ATM is not available for robbery.
atm_robbery.drilling_successful: You have successfully drilled the ATM.

store_robbery.description: Rob a store and make some quick cash.
store_robbery.information: To successfully rob a store, you need to intimidate the clerk and collect the cash from the register. Work with your team to complete the heist efficiently.

pacific_bank_robbery.label: Pacific Bank Heist
pacific_bank_robbery.description: Execute a high-stakes heist at the Pacific Bank.
pacific_bank_robbery.information: To successfully rob the Pacific Bank, you need to coordinate with your team to disable security systems, crack safes, and escape without getting caught. Make sure to plan your approach carefully and work together to complete the heist.
pacific_bank_robbery.police_alert: Bank robbery in progress at Pacific Bank!
pacific_bank_robbery.go_to_drone_arena: Go to the marked area on the map and use the drone to drop bombs.
pacific_bank_robbery.go_to_bank: Go to the marked Pacific Bank on the map to start the heist.
pacific_bank_robbery.loot_already_collected: Loot already collected from this ATM.

bobcat_robbery.label: Bobcat Security Heist
bobcat_robbery.description: Rob a Bobcat Security armored truck and make some quick cash.

truck_robbery.label: Truck Robbery
truck_robbery.description: Use handler vehicle to load container onto truck and deliver it safely.
truck_robbery.information: Eliminate guards, use handler vehicle to pick up container, load it onto the truck trailer, and deliver to the designated location. Work as a team to complete this complex operation.

train_robbery.label: Train Heist
train_robbery.description: Rob a guarded train and make some quick cash.
train_robbery.information: To successfully rob a guarded train, eliminate the guards, board the train, locate the valuable container, and open it to collect the loot.

vehicle_theft_robbery.vehicles_not_near_trailer: No target vehicles are near the trailer.
